federation.serviceSdl:
"""
The code that specifies the denomination
"""
enum CURRENCY_CODE {
  USD
  EUR
}

"""
Describes the price of a product
"""
type Price {
  currency: CURRENCY_CODE!
  amount: Float!
}

"""
Specifies to which category the product belongs
"""
enum ProductCategory {
  ALL
  GIFT_CARDS
  ELECTRONICS
  CAMERA_N_PHOTO
  VIDEO_GAMES
  BOOKS
  CLOTHING
}

"""
Entity describing a product
"""
type Product @key(fields: "id") {
  id: ID!
  title: String!
  description: String
  price: Price!
  category: ProductCategory
}

type Query {
  """
  Get a product using its id
  """
  product(id: ID!): Product
}

"""
Review entity
"""
type Review {
  id: ID!
  author: String!
  email: String!
  createdOn: Int!
  contents: String
  rating: Int!
}

"""
Entity describing a product with reviews
"""
type Product @key(fields: "id") {
  id: ID!
  reviews: [Review]
}

type Query {
  review(id: ID!): Review
}
